## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Goodcall and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content planning, and technical website issues.](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Appointment scheduling content performing well; strategy to expand into specific SMB industries](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Backlink strategy in progress; expecting slow start but ramping up in coming months](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Technical issues identified in H1 tags and mobile view; Bob to address these in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [New content priorities set: SMB appointment scheduling, voice bots, and best tools for services](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Clicks increased from 70-80 to 90 per week](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Impressions up 20% from 73k to 94k (nearly 100k/week, \~400k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Appointment scheduling category performing best, accounting for half of all clicks](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Backlink Strategy Progress

  - [15-20 links acquired so far](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Aiming for minimum 50 DR (Domain Rating) backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Process: Building database of 20k webmasters, email outreach, negotiation](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Estimated timeline: Couple of weeks to start, initial months slow, then ramping up](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Focus on quality, avoiding spam backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

### Content Strategy Expansion

  - [Double down on appointment scheduling content](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [New focus: Appointment scheduling for specific SMB types (e.g., plumbers, roofers, landscapers)](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Bob to provide prioritized list of local service business types](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Additional clusters: voice bots, best AI tools for services](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Deprioritized: insurance industry, natural language processing](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

### Technical Website Issues

  - [H1 tag duplication in code for answering service pages](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [Table of contents incorrectly tagged as H1](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Bullet point formatting issues on mobile view](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Plan to move table of contents below image on article pages](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bob to generate and share prioritized list of local service business types for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Address H1 tag issues in answering service pages](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [Fix mobile view bullet point formatting](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Relocate table of contents below images on article pages](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Remove H1 tag from table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Bob to work on Webflow fixes for identified issues](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Prateek to monitor indexing and determine if sitemap resubmission is necessary](https://fathom.video/share/S6qs9njUczxQoTRAi5dSDY4zjfRUG56s?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
